purpose: Preserve the human-readable Receipt Chain Link doctrine as a canonical, hashable artifact for future verification.
safety_rule: authority=false; execution=false; verification=false; unknowns stay unknown; chains preserve memory, not control; receipts decide; people remain human.
outputs: Stable manifest for ReceiptOS verification workflows.
validation_boundary: JOY records semantic continuity. JOY does not verify cryptographic truth. ReceiptOS may verify canonical artifacts later.
